tools.name: Git
tools.responsibility: Version control, rollback, review, and handoff.

tools.name: Local file system
tools.responsibility: Project artifacts, generated code, logs, memory, templates, and handoffs.

tools.name: Markdown + JSON artifacts
tools.responsibility: Human-readable and agent-readable project state.

tools.name: Artifact validation
tools.responsibility: Markdown/JSON pair validation and core JSON Schema checks.

tools.name: JSON Schema contracts
tools.responsibility: Machine-readable contracts for project status, checklists, gates, summaries, tasks, common phase artifacts, actions, and approvals.

tools.name: Local command runner
tools.responsibility: Optional repo-local PowerShell runner for safe checks and read-only status views.

tools.name: Local logs and events
tools.responsibility: Ignored JSONL event files for troubleshooting breadcrumbs; artifacts remain authoritative.

tools.name: File-based task records
tools.responsibility: Markdown/JSON task records for coordination without external task managers or brokers.

tools.name: Tauri dependency audit
tools.responsibility: Rust/Cargo, frontend dependency, permission, webview, and local-data audit guidance for Tauri desktop apps.

tools.name: Secret safety rules
tools.responsibility: Prevent accidental credential leakage.

tools.name: Mermaid
tools.responsibility: Lightweight diagrams in Markdown.

tools.name: Docker
tools.responsibility: Project reproducibility and local service setup when it reduces burden.

tools.name: Docker Compose
tools.responsibility: Local multi-service project templates when needed.

tools.name: GitHub
tools.responsibility: Remote backup, collaboration, publishing, and pull request workflow.

tools.name: GitHub Actions
tools.responsibility: Cloud CI for GitHub projects with local check equivalents.

tools.name: Obsidian
tools.responsibility: Local knowledge interface over Markdown files.

tools.name: Chroma
tools.responsibility: Targeted semantic search after retrieval pain is proven.

tools.name: Kubernetes
tools.responsibility: Cluster orchestration; too heavy for current local-first workflow.

tools.name: Minikube
tools.responsibility: Local Kubernetes testing; deferred with Kubernetes.

tools.name: Temporal
tools.responsibility: Durable workflow orchestration after CLI/file workflows are insufficient.

tools.name: Redis
tools.responsibility: Queues, caches, or event streams after file events are insufficient.

tools.name: RabbitMQ
tools.responsibility: Reliable async messaging between multiple services.

tools.name: Prometheus/Grafana/OpenTelemetry
tools.responsibility: Observability after long-running services exist.

tools.name: Jira/ClickUp/Trello/Confluence/Miro
tools.responsibility: Cloud-oriented tools that duplicate local files, Markdown, and optional Obsidian.
